{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323150626323A4FAF5115436032C4"}"},"total":220},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7155511178133996302","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可以不错挺好看的，我感觉以后又是一本综漫里的好书，只要不放弃，等到时候有推荐，或者说写的字数多了，看的人自然也会慢慢变多这本书后面有很多可以去写的地方，希望能一直写下去，我觉得这本书还是有潜力到番茄综漫里面几个毕竟顶尖的位置上的，毕竟首先这个题材还可以，然后目前也没有毒点，只要后续智商在线，就不至于出什么问题（有本在更新到近百章的时候就那几天大火了，也有写的好的，写到几十章就烂了自然不会有推荐）。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1666022524,"group_id":"7153883379878857731","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"春困、夏乏、秋打盹、睡不醒的冬三月。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/kQqdVLDubCW5jNRqhcwXY8aqRtmtn6B6RQUskr+F1s","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/843fa4d984394f918ffc312f4465f348~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795517&x-signature=hiIqQHJoJAozkgcrZsgKrDHdxdE%3D","user_id":"2875941679274520","user_name":"炸天帮扛把子篱笆笆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2875941679274520","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1706917841,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7153883379878857731","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到综漫日常世界。
文抄公？混吃等死？还是好好学习？
就在白井还思考着怎么如何走上人生巅峰的时候，恐怖的惊悚乐园却突然降临了。
在全世界范围内，随机挑选目标进入惊悚乐园，进行艰难的求生。
就在进入乐园的玩家抱着新手大礼包里打开的低级道具和装备痛哭的时候，白井却脸色呆滞地望着展现在自己面前的血红色提示框：
【恭喜玩家白井成功获得SSS级天赋——掠夺】
...
